title: DLSA Bongaigaon Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Driver and Office Peon Posts
short_info: District Legal Services Authority, Bongaigaon (DLSA Bongaigaon) Driver and Office Peon (Contractual) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of DLSA Bongaigaon. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the DLSA Bongaigaon Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation is admissible as per Govt. Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: HSLC passed with valid professional driving license, Class VIII passed
qualification.details: Driver (Contractual): HSLC passed with a valid professional driving license. Office Peon (Contractual): Class VIII passed. Candidates who have passed Higher Secondary (HS) or above are not eligible to apply.

salary_details.details: Driver (Contractual): Fixed Pay @ ₹ 15,000/- per month Office Peon (Contractual): Fixed Pay @ ₹ 10,000/- per month

selection_process: Skill Test followed by Viva-Voce Viva-Voce
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://bongaigaon.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
